dsl_rule.translation_notes: Breakaway pattern approximated using: (1) tall white candle = large body relative to ATR, (2) gap = close above previous high, (3) buying pressure = volume above previous bar. Exit uses reversal below entry bar low as reasonable default per AUTHOR_SILENT instruction.

backtest_rule.reason: Breakaway pattern approximated using: (1) tall white candle = large body relative to ATR, (2) gap = close above previous high, (3) buying pressure = volume above previous bar. Exit uses reversal below entry bar low as reasonable default per AUTHOR_SILENT instruction.

source_rule_text: Breakaway pattern: Buying pressure creates a tall white candle followed by a gap, with subsequent price movement
